channel.title: auricle Plugin Manager
channel.description: Most recent updates to auricle Plugin Manager

item.title: Version 3.0
item.description:
What's New in 3.0

  • Smarter plugin sorting — plugins automatically land in the right category by reading their built-in metadata, so your library stays organised without you having to do anything.
  • Custom categories — create, rename, delete, and colour-code your own categories alongside the built-in ones.
  • Plugin Library — a clean workspace to browse, search, and filter all your plugins by format, manufacturer, or category, with a detail panel for each plugin.
  • Light, Dark & Auto themes — choose your look, or let it follow macOS automatically.
  • CLAP plugin support — now scans CLAP plugins alongside VST3, AU/AUv3, VST2, and AAX.
  • Enable/disable plugins — toggle any plugin on or off with a single click, no manual file moving required.
  • Automatic updates — auricle Plugin Manager now notifies you when a new version is available and updates itself in the background.

item.title: Version 2.1
item.description:
What's New in 2.1

  • HAL extension updated. ".drive" files now show up in the preview list.
  • Updates for VST2 preview.
